Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}== IMPORTANT ANNOUNCEMENT ==[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It has been our hope since the launch of Innocent Sin Online to maintain the game for as long as we are able.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It has been our hope since the launch of Innocent Sin Online to maintain the game for as long as we are able.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Unfortunately, after careful consideration, we have made the difficult decision to terminate service.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We deeply apologize for any inconvenience this may cause for our loyal players.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The servers will remain open until the official end date. Please tie up any unfinished business before then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thank you for understanding. We hope you've enjoyed your time with Innocent Sin Online.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sincerely,[n] Innocent Sin Online staff[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The game's booted up now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm in Shinagawa Dungeon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see Maya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}...u got that message from teh admins, rite tatsuya? T_T[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya faces away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}it said their cancelling innocent sin. ...think its for real?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}yeah... i guess not many ppl were playing ne more... :＜[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}but it still sux... they prolly jus wanna save some munny -_-[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya is getting all worked up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}i finally found a place to vent my frustration and now this!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}yeah, i was a little stunned at first too[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}this MMO started out as a way to kill some tiem, but now its diff -_-;[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya gets closer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}tatsuya... do u think we'll still be able to see each other? T_T[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}yea... guess we gotta find another way ＞_＞[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}a diff MMO maybe? or irl somewhere... idk, i liked this one tho[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems a little down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}so its just an ingame relationship to u tatsuya...? ur so cold...me am cry T_T[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...i dun wanna admit it but i guess your rite ._.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems sad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}alrite, i'll try not to think about it ^^;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}wait but that'll jus make me think about it even more! T_T[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems troubled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}NO! we have to stop wasting our tiem! :([n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}maya's not goin quietly! ＞=/ i'll beat em to the punch![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}{f 5 13 10 5 1}...oh dun worry tatsu. i won't do ne thing dangerous 8)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems a little happier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}tatsuya, sumtimes in life u have to stand up for urself. times liek these.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems pretty serious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}im gonna send them a log fo the convos we've been havin together here ^_^[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}if they knwo this game is important to us, maybe they'll reconsder =D[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}even tho u might be a middle aged man or a 12 y/o girl...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}(to tell u the truth, i kinda hope ur a handsome guy tho...)[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}dun worry, maya will protect u! we'll always be partners, k?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can tell Maya cares about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}kk! i'm gonna go write my email w/ our convo log! ^_^[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}dont mess w/ maya & friends or u'll regret it! MwahAHaHhaHa![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}next time we'll celebrate our victory, k? bai~~~[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's player signed off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to log out as well.[n]{f 1 1}
